name: Bell Road Credit Center
description_short: Bell Road Credit Center is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.7/5 with 47 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Bell Road Credit Center is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 47 reviews, Bell Road Credit Center has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Phoenix area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a car finance and loan company, car dealer, motor vehicle dealer, Bell Road Credit Center provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Bell Road Credit Center operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Bell Road Credit Center should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
